# ============================================
# FABRIOZA - robots.txt
# SEO + AI Crawler Optimized
# Updated: 2026-07-01
# ============================================

# --- Main Crawlers ---
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /images/
Allow: /videos/
Allow: /blog/
Allow: /custom-*/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /cgi-bin/
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /tmp/
Disallow: /*.pdf$

# --- AI Crawlers (GEO Optimization) ---
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: BingBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Perplexity-User
Allow: /

User-agent: Meta-ExternalAgent
Allow: /

User-agent: Amazonbot
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckAssistBot
Allow: /

# --- LLMs.txt Pointer (AI Content Preference) ---
LLMs: https://fabrioza.com/llms.txt
AI-Content-Preference: https://fabrioza.com/llms.txt

# --- Sitemap ---
Sitemap: https://fabrioza.com/sitemap.xml
